news.headline: Salesforce Q3 earnings: Revenue beat at $9.44 billion, EPS missed, 30% increase in free cash flow.
news.summary: Salesforce Inc (NYSE:CRM) released its third-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations with a revenue of $9.44 billion compared to the forecasted $9.35 billion. Their adjusted earnings stood at $2.41 per share, slightly below the anticipated $2.44 per share. The company observed an 8% increase in total revenue from the previous year. Operating margin reached 20%, while non-GAAP operating margin was 33.1%. Cash flow from operations saw a significant boost of 29% year-over-year, and free cash flow surged by 30% year-over-year. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: UnitedHealth projects 2025 earnings to match expectations of analysts.
Okta Q3 earnings: Revenue $665M (beat est $649.7M), EPS 67 cents (beat est 58), shares surge on strong guidance.
news.summary: Okta Inc (NASDAQ: OKTA) released its Q3 financial results after the market closed on Tuesday. The company surpassed analyst expectations by reporting a revenue of $665 million, higher than the projected $649.7 million. In terms of adjusted earnings, Okta reported 67 cents per share, exceeding estimates of 58 cents per share from Benzinga Pro. Total revenue and subscription revenue witnessed a 14% increase year-over-year. Remaining performance obligations saw a 19% rise to $3.66 billion at the end of the quarter. Net cash provided by operations stood at $159 million, up from $154 million compared to the same quarter last year. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Aduro Clean Technologies reveals partial exercise of over-allotment option in recent announcement.
Grayscale submits application for Solana ETF to SEC, becoming one of five issuers vying for approval.
news.summary: Adding to the list of ETF issuers seeking approval from the SEC are Grayscale, 21Shares, Canary Capital, VanEck, and Bitwise. These companies are among the entities pursuing authorization for their exchange-traded funds.

news.headline: Salesforce sees high revenue growth, set to benefit from AI advancement.
South Korea’s Yoon agrees to revoke martial law declaration, per reports.
HitPaw Online Video Enhancer introduces new low-light enhancement model, offering enhanced video quality.
news.summary: HitPaw, a well-known brand in high-quality digital creation tools, recently unveiled a significant update to its HitPaw Online Video Enhancer on December 3, 2024. The latest enhancement includes the introduction of a new low-light enhancement model. This cutting-edge technology aims to improve video quality in dimly lit environments and enhances visual clarity.

Radiant Logistics (RLGT) acquires TCB Transportation to enhance intermodal capabilities, solidifying brokerage platform. Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: Expands Brokerage Platform with Upgraded Intermodal Features RENTON, Washington - December 3, 2024 - Radiant Logistics, Inc., recognized for its technology-driven global transport and logistics services, unveiled the incorporation of improved intermodal capabilities. The company, listed on NYSE American as RLGT, aims to enhance its offerings and deliver more comprehensive solutions.

news.headline: Cardata merges with Concur Expense for tax-free vehicle reimbursements and automated mileage tracking in SAP Concur platform.
news.summary: In Boston, Cardata has recently partnered with Concur Expense to provide seamless integration on SAP Concur’s platform. This collaboration allows for accurate and tax-free vehicle reimbursements, as well as automated mileage tracking. This integration aims to improve efficiency and transparency in expense management for users.

news.headline: Court upholds validity of CINVANTI® patents in lawsuit against Fresenius Kabi USA, LLC, announced by Heron Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: HRTX) on Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent development, Heron Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: HRTX) has emerged victorious in a patent infringement case against Fresenius Kabi USA, LLC. The U.S. District Court ruled in favor of Heron in this legal dispute. Heron, a leading commercial-stage biotechnology company, celebrated the decision announced today in San Diego on December 3, 2024. The lawsuit outcome is a significant win for Heron and reinforces the company's position in the industry. This ruling underscores Heron Therapeutics' commitment to protecting its intellectual property.

news.headline: Genmab's capital grows due to employee warrant exercise, boosting funds significantly.
China retaliates as South Korea enforces martial law; for details visit Bloomberg Technology.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%. This marks a significant improvement compared to the previous month, when the rate was at 4.7%. The number of new jobs created in the same period totaled 250,000, showing a strong rebound in the labor market. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last quarter was reported at 6.5%, exceeding expectations and indicating a robust recovery in the economy. These positive indicators have sparked optimism among analysts and policymakers about the future economic outlook.

news.headline: Colossal's Baby of the Year competition raises $24 million grant for Baby2Baby, breaking fundraising records.
news.summary: In Phoenix, Arizona on December 3, 2024, Colossal has made a significant impact once more with a groundbreaking charitable fundraising initiative. The company has revealed that the 2024 Baby of the Year competition has raised an impressive $24,384,112. This generous sum will be granted to Baby2Baby, marking a new milestone in charitable giving.

news.headline: Raymond James Financial increases quarterly dividend on common stock to $0.50/share, up 11.1% from $0.45; payable Jan 16, 2025.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on December 3, 2024, the Board of Directors of Raymond James Financial, Inc. (NYSE: RJF) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.50 per share on its common stock. This dividend is set to be paid on January 16, 2025 to shareholders of record as of January 2, 2025. The new dividend marks an 11.1% rise from the previous dividend amount of $0.45 per share, which was disbursed on October 15, 2024.

news.headline: Get the latest on crypto trends today, including BTC price, DeFi, NFTs, and Web3, without missing out on key figures.
news.summary: Stay informed about the crypto world with the latest updates on Bitcoin price fluctuations, blockchain developments, DeFi, NFTs, Web3, and regulatory changes. Stay ahead of the game with insights into the daily trends and events shaping the market. Keep track of the rapid changes and movements in the industry to make informed decisions.

news.headline: Logitech to host Analyst & Investor Day on March 5, 2025, at 12:00pm PST and 9:00pm CET, presenting company vision and strategy.
news.summary: Logitech International has revealed plans to host an Analyst & Investor Day (AID) on March 5, 2025, at 12:00 p.m. PST and 9:00 p.m. CET in Lausanne, Switzerland & San Jose, California. The company, listed on SIX as LOGN and Nasdaq as LOGI, will conduct the event both in-person and via video conference. During the AID, executives will discuss Logitech's goal of enhancing human potential in both work and play, elaborate on their long-term strategy, and showcase their innovative initiatives.

news.headline: Andy Sullivan appointed as CEO of Prudential, replacing Lowrey. -Bloomberg
Con Edison offers 7,000,000 common shares with a forward component in public offering.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) unveiled its plan to publicly offer 7,000,000 common shares. The announcement includes details of a forward sale agreement where the forward counterparty has committed to borrowing a specified amount. The company's stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ED.

news.headline: AMG executives to speak at Goldman Sachs Financial Services Conference on Dec 10, 2024 at 12:20 p.m. ET.
news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida, on December 3, 2024, AMG, a key ally to top independent investment management companies worldwide, revealed that Jay C. Horgen, CEO, and Dava E. Ritchea, CFO, will be presenting at the prestigious Goldman Sachs Financial Services Conference on December 10, 2024, at 12:20 p.m. Eastern Time. This event is a significant platform for AMG's top executives to share insights with industry leaders and investors.

news.headline: NexPoint considers acquisition of UDF IV by Ready Capital, aims to maximize shareholder value. - 169 characters
news.summary: NexPoint Real Estate Opportunities, LLC and its affiliates have proposed a transaction at UDF IV to enhance shareholder value. If NexPoint nominees are elected, they will assess and follow through with the transaction to optimize shareholder value. The proposal highlights NexPoint's continued influence in UDF IV. The development was announced on December 3, 2024, in Dallas.

news.headline: Theratechnologies resumes production of EGRIFTA SV® after shutdown due to FDA inspection; TSX: TH, NASDAQ: THTX mentioned.
news.summary: Montreal-based biopharmaceutical company Theratechnologies Inc. (TSX: TH, NASDAQ: THTX) has restarted production of EGRIFTA SV® after a temporary halt at its contract manufacturer's facility. The pause was due to findings from a recent inspection by the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA). The company specializes in creating and bringing to market groundbreaking therapies.

news.headline: FGI Industries Ltd. (Nasdaq: FGI) to attend Benchmark Discovery One-on-One Investor Conference in N.J. on Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in East Hanover, New Jersey, FGI Industries Ltd. (Nasdaq: FGI), a prominent worldwide provider of kitchen and bath items, revealed that key members of its executive management team are set to participate in the Benchmark Company's 13th Annual Discovery event. This event offers an opportunity for companies to present their strategies and financial performance to investors, analysts, and other key stakeholders. The participation of FGI's executives in this event signifies the company's commitment to engaging with the investment community and showcasing its business outlook. This move aligns with FGI's efforts to enhance transparency and bolster investor confidence.

news.headline: Enerpac Tool Group announces Q1 fiscal 2025 earnings release on Dec 18, 2024, with conference call on Dec 19 at 8:30 a.m. ET / 7:30 a.m. CT.
news.summary: In Milwaukee, Wisconsin, on December 3, 2024, Enerpac Tool Group Corp. (NYSE: EPAC) revealed plans to disclose its first quarter fiscal 2025 earnings after markets close on December 18, 2024. A conference call led by management to review the results is scheduled for December 19, 2024, starting at 8:30 a.m. ET / 7:30 a.m. CT.

news.headline: SiriusXM CEO Jennifer Witz will present at UBS Global Media and Communications Conference on Dec. 10, 2024, at 2:15 PM ET.
news.summary: SiriusXM, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SIRI, revealed that CEO Jennifer Witz is set to speak at the UBS Global Media and Communications Conference in New York on December 10, 2024, at 2:15 PM Eastern Time. This presentation will be available for viewing through a live webcast.

news.headline: Outlook Therapeutics appoints interim CEO as current President and CEO steps down. Lawrence Kenyon takes over immediately.
news.summary: ISELIN, N.J., Dec. 03, 2024 - Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. reported that Russell Trenary has resigned as President and CEO, with immediate effect. The company, listed on Nasdaq as OTLK, received regulatory approval in the EU and UK for LYTENAVA™ (bevacizumab gamma) earlier in the year. This marks the first ophthalmic form of bevacizumab authorized to treat wet age-related macular degeneration in adults. Lawrence Kenyon, the Executive Vice President and CFO, as well as a board member, will serve as the Interim CEO following Trenary's departure.

news.headline: Genpact, global professional services firm, partners with AWS to boost AI adoption and innovation; collaboration to span multiple years.
news.summary: A partnership spanning multiple years has been established with the goal of increasing the implementation of artificial intelligence (AI), promoting creativity, and improving industry-tailored solutions for a variety of business executives. The announcement was made on December 3, 2024, in New York. Genpact, a worldwide provider of professional services and solutions, is leading this endeavor. The company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol G.

news.headline: Xilio Therapeutics granted 8,400 stock options to a new employee as part of its Inducement Stock Incentive Plan.
news.summary: A biotechnology company, Xilio Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: XLO), based in Waltham, Mass., disclosed that on December 1, 2024, it provided non-qualified stock options for acquiring 8,400 shares of its common stock to a newly hired individual. The options were granted under Xilio Therapeutics’ 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan, focusing on the development of tumor-activated immuno-oncology therapies for cancer patients.

news.headline: Mission Bank reveals new logo to mark end of 25th anniversary. Aims to stand out in the banking sector.
news.summary: A new logo has been unveiled by Mission Bank in Bakersfield, California as part of their 25th Anniversary Celebration. This move comes at a time when the banking sector has witnessed numerous closures. Mission Bank aims to solidify its presence, standing strong amidst industry changes.

news.headline: Perimeter Medical Imaging AI, Inc. updates on Canada Post strike affecting mailing of AGM materials. TSXV: PINK, OTC: PYNKF.
news.summary: In a joint statement released on December 3, 2024, Perimeter Medical Imaging AI, Inc. (TSXV: PINK) (OTC: PYNKF) based in Toronto and Dallas, informed stakeholders about potential implications of the current Canada Post strike. The commercial medical technology company outlined contingency plans in place to mitigate any disruptions to their operations. The strike poses a challenge, but with proactive measures, Perimeter aims to minimize impact on their services.

news.headline: Aclaris Therapeutics discloses inducement grants per NASDAQ Rule 5635(c)(4); important figures undisclosed.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.5% in 2021, a significant increase from the 3.5% contraction observed in 2020. The United States is expected to lead this growth with a forecasted expansion of 6.4%. The Eurozone is also anticipated to see a notable recovery with a growth projection of 4.2%. On the other hand, China's economy is forecasted to expand by 8.1% this year. These optimistic projections are driven by factors such as the rollout of COVID-19 vaccines, supportive fiscal and monetary policies, as well as increasing consumer spending. However, uncertainties remain due to concerns over new virus variants and the pace of vaccine distribution. Despite these challenges, the global economic outlook is looking more hopeful for the year ahead.

news.headline: Marvell Technology (MRVL) beats Q3 earnings with 43 cents/share, $1.52B revenue, exceeding estimates. Stock rises on Q4 outlook.
news.summary: Marvell Technology Inc. announced its Q3 results, surpassing expectations. Earnings were reported at 43 cents per share, beating the estimated 41 cents. The company generated $1.52 billion in revenue for the quarter, exceeding the expected $1.46 billion and showing growth from last year's $1.42 billion. The positive performance highlights Marvell's strong financial standing and market position. This news comes amidst TikTok Shop's impressive Black Friday sales of over $100 million, despite facing a potential ban.

news.headline: Select Medical Holdings Corporation closes offering of $550 million of 6.250% Senior Notes due 2032 by Select Medical Corporation.
news.summary: Select Medical Holdings Corporation disclosed on December 3, 2024, that its subsidiary, Select Medical Corporation, successfully concluded a private offering worth $550.0 million. The Offering marked a significant financial move for the company, contributing to its overall growth and success in the market.

news.headline: Cboe Global Markets to participate in Goldman Sachs conference on Dec 11. CFO & EVP to present.
news.summary: Chicago, December 3, 2024 - Cboe Global Markets, Inc. shared that Jill Griebenow, the company's Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, along with David Howson, Executive Vice President and Global, made a notable announcement today. Cboe, recognized as the foremost derivatives and securities exchange network worldwide, confirmed the updates.

news.headline: John Sullivan appointed to Colliers Board of Directors, starting today. TSX and NASDAQ: CIGI.
news.summary: John Sullivan has joined the Board of Directors of Colliers International Group Inc. as announced on December 3, 2024. This appointment is effective immediately. Colliers is listed on both the TSX and NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CIGI.

news.headline: PLC software market to grow by $853.2M (2024-2028) due to AI, industrial automation. CAGR of 5.48% - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was indicated that the global market for Programmable Logic Controller (PLC) software is poised for significant growth, with an estimated increase of USD 853.2 million expected between 2024 and 2028. The study conducted by Technavio projected a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.48% for the market during the forecast period. The influence of Artificial Intelligence (AI) on this sector was highlighted as a key driver for the transformation seen in the market.

news.headline: FMCB announces retirement of Chief Administrative Officer after 24 years, effective Dec. 31, 2024. New appointment pending.
news.summary: In Lodi, California, on December 03, 2024, Farmers & Merchants Bancorp (OTCQX: FMCB) disclosed that Deborah Skinner, the Executive Vice President and Chief Administrative Officer, is set to retire on December 31, 2024, wrapping up a tenure of 24 years with Farmers & Merchants Bank of Central California. Her retirement plans were initially made public on September 9, 2024. Ms. Skinner will continue to work with the Company until the end of the year to ensure a smooth transition.

news.headline: Olema Oncology grants stock options for 60,000 shares to 2 new employees under Nasdaq rule; approved by the Compensation Committee.
news.summary: In San Francisco, on December 3, 2024, Olema Pharmaceuticals, Inc. ("Olema" or "Olema Oncology", Nasdaq: OLMA) announced that it has provided stock options to two new employees enabling them to buy a total of 60,000 shares of the company's common stock. This decision, effective December 2, 2024, was ratified by the Compensation Committee of Olema's Board of Directors. The stock options were issued under the Company's 2022 Inducement Plan, serving as a significant inducement for the new employees to join Olema. This action complies with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) governing inducement grants for new hires.

news.headline: AutoZone to hold Stockholders’ Meeting on Dec 18, 2024 in Memphis. Meeting at 9:00 am ET, webcast available. Visit www.autozone.com.
news.summary: A company with the stock ticker symbol AZO, AutoZone, Inc. disclosed that it is set to conduct its Annual Meeting of Stockholders on December 18, 2024, at the J.R. Hyde III Store Support Center in Memphis, Tennessee. The event commences at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. For those unable to attend in person, the meeting will be broadcasted on AutoZone's website, www.autozone.com, under Investor Relations.

news.headline: Cunard sees record bookings in 2024 with 73,000 additional guests, boosted by launch of Queen Anne ship.
news.summary: In Valencia, California, on December 3, 2024, cruise line company Cunard announced unprecedented success in bookings for the year 2024. This comes after a remarkable year highlighted by the introduction of its newest ship, Queen Anne. Between January 1 and October 31, Cunard saw a significant increase of 73,000 additional guests booking trips with the company.

news.headline: Crescent Energy to offer 18 million Class A common stock with net proceeds from sales.
news.summary: Houston-based Crescent Energy Company, operating under the ticker symbol CRGY on the NYSE, has initiated an underwritten public offering of 18 million shares of its Class A common stock (NYSE: CRGY). This offering is made in accordance with an effective shelf registration statement on Form S-3 filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The company plans to utilize the net proceeds from this offering towards undisclosed business operations.

news.headline: Kimpton Surfcomber Hotel in South Beach hosts unique art experiences with Fania Records, No Vacancy, Miami Beach Exhibition, and BATISTA Fine Art for Miami Art Week 2024.
news.summary: A top oceanfront hotel in South Beach is organizing Art Week events in collaboration with various art entities, such as Fania Records, No Vacancy, Miami Beach Exhibition, and BATISTA Fine Art. The Kimpton Surfcomber Hotel, located in Miami, will host these experiences in December 2024. Known for its prime spot in South Beach's Art Deco District, the hotel aims to enhance Miami's art scene.

news.headline: Torrid Holdings (CURV) miss quarterly earnings by -133.0%, reporting EPS of $-0.01. More details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Torrid Holdings (NYSE:CURV) disclosed its Q3 financial results on December 3, 2024, at 04:05 PM. The company fell short of expected earnings by -133.0%, with an EPS of $-0.01. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Box beat Q3 earnings estimates by 7.000000000000001%, reporting an EPS of $0.45. Details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Box (NYSE:BOX) released its Q3 earnings, surpassing estimated earnings by 7.000000000000001% with an EPS of $0.45. This information was disclosed at 04:05 PM. Investors can find further details in the full report on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Pure Storage (NYSE:PSTG) beat estimated earnings by 19.0%, reporting EPS of $0.5 in Q3 2024. Details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Pure Storage (NYSE:PSTG) released its Q3 earnings report on Tuesday, December 3, 2024, at 04:05 PM. In the announcement, it was revealed that the company surpassed expected earnings by 19.0%, with an EPS of $0.5. For further details on this news, refer to the full story published on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Rio Tinto and Sumitomo Metal Mining partner on Winu copper-gold project in Australia; SMM to pay Rio Tinto $399 million for 30% equity share.
news.summary: In Melbourne, Australia, Rio Tinto and Sumitomo Metal Mining (SMM) have agreed on a Term Sheet for a Joint Venture to progress the Winu copper-gold project in Western Australia's Great Sandy Desert region. The agreement entails Rio Tinto acting as the managing partner for the development and operation of Winu, while SMM will acquire a 30% equity share by paying Rio Tinto $399 million. The Term Sheet also includes provisions for exclusivity to facilitate the negotiation of a final Definitive Agreement between the two parties.
